prompt: Create a realistic full-body nighttime rooftop portrait of a young East Asian woman standing on a concrete apartment rooftop terrace with a city skyline in the background. She has long straight black hair with soft bangs, fair skin, a slim build, and a calm slightly serious expression while looking directly at the camera. She wears a fitted white sleeveless ribbed cropped tank top, high-waisted light blue straight-leg jeans, white low-top sneakers, and a delicate small pendant necklace. Pose her upright near a metal safety railing, one hand lightly resting on the rail and the other relaxed by her side, with one foot subtly forward. The setting is an urban rooftop at night: dark navy sky, distant high-rise buildings with softly blurred window lights and red antenna lights, concrete floor, low parapet walls, metal railings, and a warm wall light glowing near a rooftop door on the left. Use cinematic realistic photography, vertical full-body composition, natural skin texture, soft flash or diffused key light on the subject, shallow depth of field, cool ambient city tones balanced with warm side light, 35mm lens look, high detail, no text, no watermark, no extra people.

promptZh: 生成一张写实的夜间天台全身人像，画面主体为 一位年轻的东亚女性，她站在混凝土公寓的天台露台上，背景是城市天际线。她留着 黑色长直发，配有柔和的刘海，肤色白皙，身材苗条，神情平静且略带严肃，直视镜头。她身穿 一件修身白色无袖罗纹短款背心，搭配 高腰浅蓝色直筒牛仔裤、白色低帮运动鞋，并佩戴一条精致的小吊坠项链。让她直立在金属安全护栏旁，一只手轻轻搭在栏杆上，另一只手自然垂在身侧，一只脚微微向前。场景设定为夜间的城市天台：深蓝色的夜空，远处高楼大厦闪烁着柔和模糊的窗灯和红色天线灯，地面为混凝土材质，配有低矮的女儿墙和金属护栏，左侧天台门旁有一盏温暖的壁灯。采用电影级写实摄影风格，垂直全身构图，呈现自然的皮肤纹理，对主体使用柔光闪光灯或漫射主光，浅景深效果，冷色调的城市环境光与温暖的侧光平衡，35mm 镜头质感，高细节，无文字，无水印，画面中无其他人物。
